description_long: This is a modern, square-shaped side table or open shelf unit featuring a sturdy black metal frame and two flat wooden surfaces. The top and lower shelf are made of wood with a rich, dark brown grain, providing both aesthetic appeal and functional storage space. The open design allows for easy access from all sides, making it suitable for use as a nightstand, end table, or display shelf in urban environments. The frame is constructed from rectangular metal tubing, giving the piece a minimalist, industrial look. There are no visible doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its open and accessible structure. The overall build appears robust, with the metal frame supporting the wooden surfaces securely.
description: A modern, square open shelf unit with a black metal frame and two dark wood surfaces. Its minimalist, industrial design offers accessible storage or display space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the top and lower wooden shelves, framed by the black metal structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wooden surfaces within the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open structure and both wooden shelves framed by metal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and open accessibility of the shelves.
